name: dynamic-weather
description: A module that creates realistic, time-based weather pattern transitions using Foundry VTT rolltables. Supports normal, strange, and hybrid weather modes for any campaign style.

scripts.build:db: fvtt package pack weather-tables --in src/packs/weather-tables/_source --out packs
scripts.build:json: fvtt package unpack weather-tables --in packs --out src/packs/weather-tables/_source
